products.title: Nebula Premium Hoodie
products.description: A high-fidelity minimalist hoodie crafted from organic heavyweight cotton. Features custom glassmorphism cord toggles and a deep double-lined hood for premium comfort.

products.title: Pulse Wireless Headset
products.description: Active noise-cancelling headphones featuring spatial audio, custom 40mm dynamic drivers, and a sleek brushed metallic finish with memory-foam ear cushions.

products.title: Horizon Smart Watch
products.description: Track your health metrics in real-time with an OLED edge-to-edge display, 7-day battery life, and custom water-resistant leather wristbands.

products.title: Quantum Leather Backpack
products.description: Handcrafted top-grain leather bag with integrated 16-inch laptop sleeve, secret security pocket, and magnetic quick-release metal clasps.

products.title: Apex Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: Custom mechanical keyboard with lubricated linear switches, dynamic double-shot PBT keycaps, and full RGB underglow customizable animations.

products.title: Vanguard Unisex Sneakers
products.description: Eco-friendly mesh upper design with responsive foam cushioning. Engineered for maximum shock absorption and high-speed energy return.
